allow: Bash(sqlite3 /tmp/seedtest.db "SELECT \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM tests\) AS tests, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM test_ranges\) AS ranges, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM doctors\) AS doctors, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM panels\) AS panels, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM users\) AS users;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column /tmp/flow.db "SELECT t.code, t.name, p.code AS panel_code, p.report_heading, r.value, r.flag FROM orders o JOIN tests t ON o.test_id=t.id LEFT JOIN panels p ON t.panel_id=p.id LEFT JOIN results r ON r.order_id=o.id WHERE o.patient_id=1 ORDER BY p.sort_order, t.sort_order;")
Bash(sqlite3 -header -column /tmp/flow.db "SELECT tr.sex, tr.low, tr.high, tr.range_text FROM test_ranges tr JOIN tests t ON tr.test_id=t.id WHERE t.code='HB';")
Bash(sqlite3 -header -column /tmp/flow.db "SELECT total, concession, net, received, balance FROM bills WHERE patient_id=1;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column /tmp/flow.db 'SELECT p.test_no, p.name, COALESCE\(b.total,0\) total, COALESCE\(b.received,0\) received, COALESCE\(b.balance,0\) balance, b.mode FROM patients p LEFT JOIN bills b ON b.patient_id=p.id LEFT JOIN doctors d ON p.doctor_id=d.id WHERE date\(p.registered_at,'\\''localtime'\\''\) BETWEEN '\\''2020-01-01'\\'' AND '\\''2030-01-01'\\'' ORDER BY p.registered_at;')

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column /tmp/flow.db 'SELECT strftime\('\\''%Y-%m'\\'', p.registered_at,'\\''localtime'\\''\) month, COUNT\(DISTINCT p.id\) patients, COALESCE\(SUM\(b.total\),0\) total FROM patients p LEFT JOIN bills b ON b.patient_id=p.id GROUP BY month;')

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column /tmp/flow.db 'SELECT t.code, COUNT\(o.id\) count, COALESCE\(SUM\(o.price_charged\),0\) revenue FROM orders o JOIN tests t ON o.test_id=t.id JOIN patients p ON o.patient_id=p.id GROUP BY t.id ORDER BY count DESC;')
Bash(sqlite3 -header -column /tmp/flow.db 'SELECT d.name, COUNT\(p.id\) referral_count FROM doctors d LEFT JOIN patients p ON p.doctor_id=d.id GROUP BY d.id ORDER BY referral_count DESC LIMIT 3;')

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column /tmp/flow.db 'SELECT p.name, p.test_no, COUNT\(o.id\) test_count FROM patients p LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.patient_id=p.id WHERE p.name='\\''RAVI KUMAR'\\'' GROUP BY p.id;')

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column '/Users/namansharma/Library/Application Support/com.namansharma.scl-lab-app/scl.db' 'SELECT id,username,role,substr\(password_hash,1,28\) AS hash_prefix,length\(password_hash\) AS hash_len,active,force_password_change FROM users;')

Bash(sqlite3 '/Users/namansharma/Library/Application Support/com.namansharma.scl-lab-app/scl.db' 'UPDATE users SET password_hash='\\''$argon2id$placeholder$changeme'\\'', force_password_change=1 WHERE username='\\''admin'\\'';')

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column '/Users/namansharma/Library/Application Support/com.namansharma.scl-lab-app/scl.db' 'SELECT username, substr\(password_hash,1,24\) AS hash, force_password_change FROM users;')
Bash(sqlite3 /tmp/fk.db "PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON; INSERT INTO orders\(patient_id,test_id,price_charged,sample_id\) VALUES\(0,\(SELECT id FROM tests WHERE code='HB'\),30,'1'\);")

Bash(sqlite3 /tmp/fk.db "PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON; INSERT INTO patients\(test_no,name,age,age_unit,sex,doctor_id\) VALUES\(1,'X',20,'YRS','MALE',\(SELECT id FROM doctors WHERE name='SELF'\)\); INSERT INTO orders\(patient_id,test_id,price_charged,sample_id\) VALUES\(last_insert_rowid\(\),\(SELECT id FROM tests WHERE code='HB'\),30,'1'\); SELECT 'OK rows:', \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM orders\);")
Bash(sqlite3 -header -column /tmp/m3.db "SELECT code,name,price,is_panel FROM tests WHERE is_panel=1;")
Bash(awk "/CBC \\\(Complete Blood Count sub-parameters\\\)/{f=1} f&&/INTO tests/{c=1;next} c&&/^-- ──/{exit} c{print}" src-tauri/migrations/0002_seed.sql)
Bash(printf '\\n# Rust / Cargo\\n. "$HOME/.cargo/env"\\n' >> "$HOME/.zshrc" && echo "added to ~/.zshrc:" && tail -3 "$HOME/.zshrc")
